description: The ObjectScroller component acts as a way to scroll a list of items with sizes by offsetting them within a region they should appear within. Objects outside of the region get disabled until the ``Offset`` allows them to appear within it again.

fields.Items: A list of items to move and activate/deactivate if they are within/outside of the ``RegionSize``
fields.Offset: How much to offset the positions of ``Items`` in order to scroll them.
fields.RegionSize: The size area objects have to be touching from their current position and size after ``Offset`` is applied in order to stay visible.

usage: Attach to a slot and add/setup ``Items`` entries to begin use.
